title: Once a Lady
writer: Zoe Akins, Rudolph Bernauer, Samuel Hoffenstein
actors: Ruth Chatterton, Ivor Novello, Jill Esmond
plot: "Once a Lady" is a 1931 American Pre-Code drama film directed by Guthrie McClintic and starring Ruth Chatterton, Ivor Novello, and Jill Esmond. The film, produced and distributed by Paramount Pictures, is a remake of the Pola Negr...
